summary: Reel Generator Reference-Based Generation & Quick Presets - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (standard generation, reference generation with text/URL, schema validation, all 8 preset configs). Frontend: All UI elements verified - 8 preset chips, mode toggle, reference inputs (URL, Text, Notes), preset click changes form controls, preset deselection works.
critical_code_review_comments: ReelGenerator.js: QUICK_PRESETS array (lines 50-83) correctly defines all 8 presets with configs - WORKING
ReelGenerator.js: handlePresetSelect (lines 667-675) applies preset config and shows toast - WORKING
ReelGenerator.js: Clicking active preset deselects it (line 668-670) - WORKING
ReelGenerator.js: Manually changing control clears activePreset (line 665) - WORKING
ReelGenerator.js: Reference mode toggle (lines 761-788) with data-testid='mode-fresh' and 'mode-reference' - WORKING
ReelGenerator.js: Reference inputs (lines 791-837) with URL, Text, Notes fields - WORKING
ReelGenerator.js: Reference DNA tab (line 125) only shows when result.is_reference_based (line 989) - WORKING
ReelGenerator.js: Auto-switches to reference_analysis tab after reference generation (line 594) - WORKING
generation.py: generate_reel_content_inline handles reference_url, reference_text, reference_notes (lines 48-69) - WORKING
generation.py: extract_url_content extracts text from URLs with fallback (lines 154-232) - WORKING
generation.py: Reference mode uses REEL_REFERENCE_SYSTEM_PROMPT and REEL_REFERENCE_USER_PROMPT_TEMPLATE - WORKING
schemas.py: GenerateReelRequest includes reference_url, reference_text, reference_notes fields (lines 63-65) - WORKING
shared.py: REEL_REFERENCE_SYSTEM_PROMPT and REEL_REFERENCE_USER_PROMPT_TEMPLATE defined (lines 419-506) - WORKING
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account with unlimited credits
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reel Generator Reference-Based Generation & Quick Presets fully tested in iteration 400. Key findings: 1) Backend API POST /api/generate/reel accepts optional reference_url, reference_text, reference_notes fields; 2) When reference_text is provided, response includes is_reference_based=true, reference_source='text', and reference_analysis object with 7 fields (hook_pattern, pacing_structure, emotional_arc, cta_approach, format_choices, what_was_kept, what_was_changed); 3) Frontend has 8 Quick Preset chips (Viral Hook, Luxury Reel, Product Promo, UGC Ad, Storytelling, Educational, Kids Story, Faceless Biz) that prefill form controls; 4) Reference mode toggle shows/hides reference inputs (URL, Text, Notes); 5) Reference DNA tab appears in output tabs only when result.is_reference_based is true; 6) All data-testid attributes present for testing: quick-presets, preset-{id}, mode-fresh, mode-reference, reference-inputs, reference-url-input, reference-text-input, reference-notes-input, tab-reference_analysis.

backend_standard_generation.details: POST /api/generate/reel without reference fields returns standard output without reference_analysis

backend_reference_generation_text.details: POST /api/generate/reel with reference_text returns is_reference_based=true, reference_source='text', reference_analysis

backend_reference_generation_url.details: POST /api/generate/reel with reference_url extracts content or falls back gracefully

backend_schema_validation.details: reference_url (2000 chars), reference_text (5000 chars), reference_notes (1000 chars) accepted

backend_preset_configs.details: All 8 preset configurations accepted by backend schema

frontend_quick_presets_render.details: All 8 preset chips render with correct labels and icons

frontend_preset_click_changes_form.details: Clicking Faceless Biz preset changes platform to TikTok, format to Faceless, etc.

frontend_preset_deselection.details: Clicking active preset deselects it (removes ring-1 class)

frontend_reference_mode_toggle.details: Fresh Create / From Reference toggle shows/hides reference inputs

frontend_reference_inputs.details: URL input, Text textarea, Notes input all present with correct data-testid

frontend_reference_dna_tab_conditional.details: Reference DNA tab only appears when result.is_reference_based is true (verified in code)

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real LLM generation via Emergent LLM Key. Generation takes 10-30 seconds.
